complaints.message:
Confirm reasonable bounding box size:
20.97m, 48.80m, 18.02m
Make sure these sizes are within the same order of magnitude you expect from this object IRL.
If the scale is off, please let us know by a factor of how much (for example, 1000 if something
that's supposed to be 1mm is 1m instead) in your complaint note.

Confirm articulation:
This object has the below movable links annotated:
- N/A

They have now all been set to their upper (maximum) limits.
Verify that these are all the moving parts you expect from this object
and that the joint limits look reasonable.
complaints.complaint: trunk and door needs to be openable

complaints.message:
Confirm reasonable bounding box size:
20.97m, 48.80m, 18.02m
Make sure these sizes are within the same order of magnitude you expect from this object IRL.
If the scale is off, please let us know by a factor of how much (for example, 1000 if something
that's supposed to be 1mm is 1m instead) in your complaint note.
Was at least one of the collision mesh candidates acceptable?

Confirm articulation:
This object has the below movable links annotated:
- N/A

They have now all been set to their upper (maximum) limits.
Verify that these are all the moving parts you expect from this object
and that the joint limits look reasonable.

ABILITIES: Confirm that this object can support all of the abilities seen below.

Abilities to evaluate (subset of all abilities): 
    cloth: False
    coldSource: False
    fillable: False
    heatSource: False
    openable: False
    particleApplier: False
    particleRemover: False
    particleSink: False
    particleSource: False
    toggleable: False

If this object looks like it should have some of these abilities flipped, please
list the abilities that we should flip for this object as a comma separated list.
For example, for an unopenable window you would put in 'openable'.

APPEARANCE: Confirm object visual appearance.
Requirements:
- make sure the object has a valid texture or appearance (e.g., texture not black,
       transparency rendered correctly, etc).
- make sure any glass parts are transparent (would this object contain glass? e.g.
       wall pictures, clocks, etc. - anything wrong)
- compare the object against the 3ds Max image that should open up now.

ARTICULATION: Confirm articulation:
This object has the below movable links annotated:
- None

Verify that the joint limits look reasonable and that the object is not
missing articulations that would make it useless. Do NOT be overly ambitious - we
only care about MUST-HAVE articulations here.
